strategy: He resists Ice and Death 70%. Attack with Fire or Life (+5% each) or bring a prism.
His only trick is stacked Tower Shields: his pet adds one on round 4 on top of his own. Time your hit before round 4, or pack Pierce or Shatter to blow through both.
Watch his +95% outgoing damage. Shield the incoming hits while you build blades.
Deal with the Vine Thrasher and Mutant Briar with an AoE finish, or pick them off if they threaten you.
Stack blades and a Feint over rounds 1-3, then hit on round 3 before the pet's shield, or bring Shatter for round 4 and later.
cheatNotes: On round 4 his pet stacks a Tower Shield with his own, doubling his defense. Either land your big hit by round 3 or carry Pierce or Shatter to strip both before you swing.
